posts.author: Andi_B (Andrea Buma)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t see this already raised so here goes

We’d love to be able to use connect boards ++ to contribute to automating portfolio level reporting - on project by project progress, health, etc. To this time, we’ve taken advantage of connect boards but it doesn’t go as far as we’d like, only inputting activities rather than rounding up milestones, reporting on progress towards, automating health indicators based on status/date columns, etc. Is this in the works?? Hoping so! If not yet, would love to chat further. Thank you!!
